message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

package "sw-explorer" {
    participant "WebApp" as WebApp
    participant "SWData" as SWData
}

package "Example background processing module" {
    participant "Manager" as Manager
    participant "MessageQueue" as MessageQueue
    participant "Worker" as Worker
    participant "Memcache" as Memcache
}

note right of Manager: This is just an example.\nWe could got wi go with Celery, but sometimes it's good\nto hide the concrete engine behind the abstraction layer.

activate WebApp
activate SWData
activate Manager
activate MessageQueue
activate Worker
activate Memcache

' Fetch new collection sequence
User -> WebApp : fetch new collection
WebApp -> SWData : fetch new collection
SWData -> Manager : schedule a job
Manager -> MessageQueue : schedule a job
MessageQueue -> Worker : execute a job
Worker -> Manager : update job status
Manager -> Memcache : update job status
Worker -> Manager : job result
Manager -> Memcache : job result

deactivate Worker
deactivate MessageQueue
deactivate Manager
deactivate SWData
deactivate WebApp

' View pending collection sequence
activate WebApp
activate SWData
activate Manager
activate Memcache

User -> WebApp : view pending collection
WebApp -> SWData : get job status
SWData -> Manager : get job status
Manager -> Memcache : get job status

deactivate Memcache
deactivate Manager
deactivate SWData
deactivate WebApp

@enduml
```
